description: Google Ads API for account discovery, GAQL reporting, campaigns, budgets, assets, conversions, audiences, planning, and billing operations.

auth_env_var_specs.name: GOOGLE_ADS_ACCESS_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: OAuth2 access token with the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/adwords scope.

auth_env_var_specs.name: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Google Ads developer token sent as the developer-token header.

auth_env_var_specs.name: GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: Optional manager account ID sent as the login-customer-id header.

novel_features.name: GAQL account drilldown
novel_features.description: Run Google Ads Query Language searches from the terminal or MCP surface with JSON output.

novel_features.name: Accessible customer discovery
novel_features.description: Discover the Google Ads customer resources available to the configured OAuth identity before querying.

novel_features.name: Google Ads field catalog lookup
novel_features.description: Search Google Ads field metadata so agents can construct valid GAQL queries.

catalog_description: Discover accounts, run GAQL reports, inspect field metadata, and manage Google Ads campaigns, budgets, assets, audiences, and billing.
